flashcards.back:
Productivity: Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Slack
CRM: Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk
Finance/HR: Workday, QuickBooks, BambooHR
Developer: GitHub, Jira, Datadog
Design: Figma, Canva, Adobe CC

Per-User: Fixed price per user (Slack, Salesforce)
Tiered: Feature-based tiers (HubSpot)
Usage-Based: Pay per use (Twilio, AWS)
Freemium: Free basic + paid premium (Dropbox)

REST API: Direct programmatic access
Webhooks: Event-driven push notifications
iPaaS: No-code integration platforms (Zapier)
OAuth: Secure authorization for integrations

- Security certifications (SOC 2, ISO)
- API availability
- Integration ecosystem
- SLA guarantees
- Data export options
- Support quality
